title: Billable package DB3 links to customer pipe chart
description:
Create billable package now keeps the WinCan .db3 link on the customer package folder so pipe chart / PACP load when you open a copied video.

What was wrong: the package files copied to Customer, but the DB3 assignment was saved under the Employee job (or rejected as cross-job). Customer explorer never loaded that link, so the pipe chart stayed empty.

Also fixed: cloud copy with copyOnly no longer deletes the Employee source files. Linked Employee .db3 files can be downloaded for inspection when the customer package folder is bound to them.

Who is affected: PipeShare billable packaging on BASE (and SaaS after Push).
changeLog: Save folder DB3 bindings under the Customer package job, even when the .db3 file stays on Employee.
Allow admin same-client Employee→Customer DB3 links for billable packages.
Honor copyOnly on cloud move so billable package clones do not delete source files.
Allow downloading a linked Employee .db3 when viewing a Customer package video.
Persist DB3 on package root and Videos/Reports/Images/Ovality subfolders after build.
